root.rep_text: แบบรายงานที่ 7 - แบบรายงานฐานะสภาพคล่องสุทธิ
root.sql:
SELECT operate_date, item_type, item_desc, time_now, time_y1g_y5 + time_y5g_y10 + time_y10g as time_y1g_y5 , time_noterm as time_noterm, time_1m, time_2m, time_3m, time_4m, time_5m, time_6m, time_7m, time_8m, time_9m, time_10m, time_11m, time_12m
, ( time_now + time_y1g_y5 + time_y5g_y10 + time_y10g + time_noterm + time_1m + time_2m + time_3m + time_4m + time_5m + time_6m + time_7m + time_8m + time_9m + time_10m + time_11m + time_12m ) as total_amount
FROM sc_rep_scq_form8_mis65 where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ order by item_type
